generated_oml:
instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring room temperature with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal box temperature (first)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal box temperature (second)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance PhysicalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo INTOCPSOpenSourceEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters: C_air (air thermal capacitance) and G_box (box thermal conductance), assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo INTOCPSOpenSourceEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters: C_heater (heater thermal capacitance), C_air (air thermal capacitance), G_heater (heater-box thermal conductance), G_box (box-ambient thermal conductance), accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo INTOCPSOpenSourceEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between physical system and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance INTOCPSOpenSourceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source software from INTO-CPS Association repository for digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated dynamic models (Model A and Model B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimality violations using temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityViolationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic to regulate temperature within predefined upper and lower limits, generating recommendations for human decision"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlRecommendationInsight
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature value from thermal model prediction"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected (e.g., temperature outside safe range)"
]

instance OptimalityViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimality violation detected (e.g., temperature not within optimal range for process)"
]

instance ControlRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation for heatbed control action based on bang-bang logic"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current control of heatbed"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed requiring 4A current, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow, operating at 12V or 18V"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam container, heatbed, fan, sensors, and control components"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4ModelB, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into GPIO signals to control the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-based communication layer connects the physical twin (sensors, actuators) with virtual twin components (controller, models, calibration algorithms), where the controller processes sensor data and sends actuation commands through RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments (Section 4.1) and parameter calibration using least squares minimization of residual error between model predictions and experimental data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) serves as the technical connection between physical and virtual components, with all communication routed through the RabbitMQ server hosted on the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver) are deployed on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with the communication server running locally on the same hardware as the physical twin controller."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with controller parameters (LL, UL) ensuring temperature regulation within safe limits to prevent overheating."
]
